summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Polymarket Telegram bot. All 5 specified features tested successfully with 100% backend functionality working. Bot is running via supervisor and responding correctly to all commands.

minor_issues.issue: HTTP 409 Conflict when testing updates polling while bot is running
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - indicates bot is already actively polling

passed_tests: Environment Setup - Telegram Bot Token Present
Environment Setup - Polymarket Private Key Present
Environment Setup - Polymarket Funder Address Present
Polymarket Client Initialization - Client initialized successfully
CLOB Client Available - Address derived correctly
Balance API Response - USDC balance retrieval working
Market Fetching by Slug - Polymarket markets API accessible
Bot Start Command - /start responds with correct message
Bot Wallet Command - /wallet shows wallet information
Polymarket Link Parsing - URL regex parsing working for all formats
User Client Functionality - Client management working
Bot API Connection - Live connection to Telegram API confirmed
Webhook Status - Bot polling mode confirmed
Supervisor Status - Bot running with PID 474, uptime confirmed
success_percentage: backend: 100%, frontend: N/A (backend only testing requested)
